api/Opticon.Csp2Status.html.title: Enum Csp2Status | Opticon.csp2 .NET wrapper for the Opticon CSP2 library
api/Opticon.Csp2Status.html.summary: Enum Csp2Status Namespace Opticon Assembly Opticon.csp2.dll Status codes returned by the CSP2 library. public enum Csp2Status Fields AccessDenied = 5 Access denied. BadParameter = -2 Invalid parameter passed. CommandLrcError = -7 Command LRC (checksum) error. CommunicationsError = -1 General communications error (e.g. disconnected device). DllArchitectureMismatch = -15 CSP2 DLL architecture mismatch. DllNotFound = -14 CSP2 DLL not found. FileNotFound = 2 File not found. FirmwareFailure = -12 Firmware failure. GeneralError = -9 General unspecified error. InvalidCommandNumber = -4 Invalid command number. Ok = 0 Operation completed successfully. ReceivedCharacterError = -8 Received character error. SetupError = -3 Device setup error. TemporaryError = -13 Temporary error (retry may succeed). Uninitialized = -10 Device not initialized. VersionError = -11 Version mismatch.

api/Opticon.OpnDevice.html.title: Class OpnDevice | Opticon.csp2 .NET wrapper for the Opticon CSP2 library
api/Opticon.OpnDevice.html.summary: Class OpnDevice Namespace Opticon Assembly Opticon.csp2.dll High-level wrapper around the csp2 API for Opticon OPN Companion devices. public sealed class OpnDevice : IDisposable Inheritance object OpnDevice Implements IDisposable Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Remarks This class simplifies usage of the low-level API functions by providing a more intuitive object-oriented interface. Constructors OpnDevice(int) Initializes a new instance of the OpnDevice class. public OpnDevice(int port) Parameters port int The COM port number (e.g. 3 for COM3). Properties IsConnected Checks whether data is available to be read from the device. public bool IsConnected { get; } Property Value bool true if data is available; otherwise false. IsDataAvailable Checks whether data is available to be read from the device. public bool IsDataAvailable { get; } Property Value bool true if data is available; otherwise false. Port Gets the COM port number associated with this device. public int Port { get; } Property Value int Methods ClearBarcodes() Clears all barcode data stored on the device. public void ClearBarcodes() Exceptions OpnException When the command fails. Connect() Opens the connection to the device. public void Connect() Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the connection fails. DisablePolling() Temporarily pauses polling. public static int DisablePolling() Returns int Disconnect() Closes the connection to the device. public void Disconnect() Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the disconnection fails. Dispose() Releases the device and closes the connection. public void Dispose() Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the disconnection fails. EnablePolling() Resumes polling if previously paused. public static int EnablePolling() Returns int EnumerateBarcodes() Enumerates barcode data as a stream. public IEnumerable<BarcodeRecord> EnumerateBarcodes() Returns IEnumerable<BarcodeRecord> An enumerable sequence of barcode data packets. Remarks This method allows lazy iteration over barcode data. FindDevices() Scans for connected Opticon OPN Companion devices. public static IReadOnlyList<OpnDevice> FindDevices() Returns IReadOnlyList<OpnDevice> A list of detected OpnDevice instances. Remarks This method queries all available COM ports and returns those compatible with Opticon devices. GetDeviceId() Retrieves the unique device ID. Returns cached value if disconnected. public string GetDeviceId() Returns string The 6-digit or 7-digit serial number. Exceptions OpnException When the command fails and no cached data exists. GetModel() Retrieves the device model name based on the software version string. public string GetModel() Returns string The model name (e.g., "OPN2001", "PX20"). Exceptions OpnException When the interrogate command or data retrieval fails. GetParameter(OpnParameter, out bool) Gets a parameter as a boolean value. Throws an exception if the operation fails. public void GetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, out bool enabled) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. enabled bool The retrieved boolean value. Exceptions OpnException Thrown if the underlying hardware call fails. GetParameter(OpnParameter, out byte[]) Gets a parameter as raw byte data. Throws an exception if the operation fails. public void GetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, out byte[] data) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. data byte[] The retrieved raw byte data. Exceptions OpnException Thrown if the underlying hardware call fails. GetParameter(OpnParameter, out int) Gets a parameter as an integer value. Throws an exception if the operation fails. public void GetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, out int value) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. value int The retrieved integer value. Exceptions OpnException Thrown if the underlying hardware call fails. GetParameter(OpnParameter, out string) Gets a parameter as a string. Throws an exception if the operation fails. public void GetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, out string value) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. value string The retrieved string value. Exceptions OpnException Thrown if the underlying hardware call fails. GetParameter<TEnum>(OpnParameter, out TEnum) Gets a parameter as an enumeration value. Performs validation for defined members. public void GetParameter<TEnum>(OpnParameter parameter, out TEnum value) where TEnum : struct, Enum Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. value TEnum The retrieved enumeration value. Type Parameters TEnum The type of the enumeration. Exceptions OpnException Thrown if the underlying hardware call fails. GetProtocolVersion() Retrieves the protocol version number. public int GetProtocolVersion() Returns int The protocol version number. Exceptions OpnException When the command fails and no cached data exists. GetRtcMode() Retrieves the current RTC (Real-Time Clock) mode. public int GetRtcMode() Returns int The RTC mode value (0 = TimeStamp is disabled, 1 = Timestamp is enabled). Exceptions OpnException When the command fails. GetSoftwareVersion() Retrieves the firmware/software version string. public string GetSoftwareVersion() Returns string The software version string. Exceptions OpnException When the command fails and no cached data exists. GetTime(out DateTime) Retrieves the current device time. public void GetTime(out DateTime dateTime) Parameters dateTime DateTime Exceptions OpnException When the command fails. Interrogate() Requests the device to send its current status and identification data. public void Interrogate() Remarks GetDeviceId() GetSoftwareVersion() and GetProtocolVersion() automatically call this function if required Exceptions OpnException When the command fails. ReadBarcodes() Reads all barcode data currently stored on the device. public IReadOnlyList<BarcodeRecord> ReadBarcodes() Returns IReadOnlyList<BarcodeRecord> A read-only list of barcode data packets. Remarks This method also retrieves device information such as ID, protocol, or firmware version. Exceptions OpnException When the command fails. SetParameter(OpnParameter, bool) Sets a specific parameter on the device using a boolean value. public void SetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, bool enabled) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. enabled bool Indicates whether the parameter should be enabled (1) or disabled (0). Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the command fails. SetParameter(OpnParameter, byte[]) Sets a specific parameter on the device using raw byte data. public void SetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, byte[] data) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. data byte[] The raw byte data to set for the parameter. Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the command fails. ArgumentNullException Thrown when data is null. SetParameter(OpnParameter, int) Sets a specific parameter on the device using an integer value. public void SetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, int value) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. value int The value to set for the parameter. Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the command fails. SetParameter(OpnParameter, string) Sets a specific parameter on the device using a string value (e.g., scratch pad data). public void SetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, string data) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. data string The string value to set. Converted to ASCII before being sent. Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the command fails. SetParameter<TEnum>(OpnParameter, TEnum) Sets a specific parameter on the device using an enumeration value. public void SetParameter<TEnum>(OpnParameter parameter, TEnum value) where TEnum : struct, Enum Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. value TEnum The enumeration value to set for the parameter. Type Parameters TEnum The enumeration type. Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the command fails. SetTime(DateTime) Sets the device real-time clock. public void SetTime(DateTime time) Parameters time DateTime The DateTime to set on the device. Exceptions OpnException When the command fails. SetToDefault() Resets the device to its factory default mode. public void SetToDefault() Exceptions OpnException When the command fails. StartPolling(DeviceDetectedHandler) Starts polling all COM ports for devices. public static int StartPolling(OpnDevice.DeviceDetectedHandler callback) Parameters callback OpnDevice.DeviceDetectedHandler Returns int StopPolling() Stops polling completely. public static int StopPolling() Returns int TryGetParameter(OpnParameter, out bool) Attempts to get a parameter as a boolean value without throwing an exception. public bool TryGetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, out bool enabled) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. enabled bool The retrieved boolean value. False if failed. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully retrieved; otherwise, false. TryGetParameter(OpnParameter, out byte[]) Attempts to get a parameter as raw byte data without throwing an exception. public bool TryGetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, out byte[] data) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. data byte[] The retrieved raw byte data. Default if failed. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully retrieved; otherwise, false. TryGetParameter(OpnParameter, out int) Attempts to get a parameter as an integer value without throwing an exception. public bool TryGetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, out int value) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. value int The retrieved integer value. Default if failed. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully retrieved; otherwise, false. TryGetParameter(OpnParameter, out string) Attempts to get a parameter as a string without throwing an exception. public bool TryGetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, out string value) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. value string The retrieved string value. Empty if failed. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully retrieved; otherwise, false. TryGetParameter<TEnum>(OpnParameter, out TEnum) Attempts to get a parameter as an enumeration value without throwing an exception. public bool TryGetParameter<TEnum>(OpnParameter parameter, out TEnum value) where TEnum : struct, Enum Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to retrieve. value TEnum The retrieved enumeration value. Default if failed. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully retrieved; otherwise, false. Type Parameters TEnum The type of the enumeration. TrySetParameter(OpnParameter, bool) Attempts to set a specific parameter on the device using a boolean value without throwing an exception. public bool TrySetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, bool enabled) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. enabled bool Indicates whether the parameter should be enabled or disabled. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully set; otherwise, false. TrySetParameter(OpnParameter, byte[]) Attempts to set a specific parameter on the device using raw byte data without throwing an exception. public bool TrySetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, byte[] data) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. data byte[] The raw byte data to set for the parameter. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully set; otherwise, false. TrySetParameter(OpnParameter, int) Attempts to set a specific parameter on the device using an integer value without throwing an exception. public bool TrySetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, int value) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. value int The value to set for the parameter. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully set; otherwise, false. TrySetParameter(OpnParameter, string) Attempts to set a specific parameter on the device using a string value without throwing an exception. public bool TrySetParameter(OpnParameter parameter, string data) Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. data string The string value to set. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully set; otherwise, false. TrySetParameter<TEnum>(OpnParameter, TEnum) Attempts to set a specific parameter on the device using an enumeration value without throwing an exception. public bool TrySetParameter<TEnum>(OpnParameter parameter, TEnum value) where TEnum : struct, Enum Parameters parameter OpnParameter The parameter to set. value TEnum The enumeration value to set for the parameter. Returns bool True if the parameter was successfully set; otherwise, false. Type Parameters TEnum The enumeration type.

api/Opticon.OpnEnvironment.OpnDebugMode..title: Enum OpnEnvironment.OpnDebugMode | Opticon.csp2 .NET wrapper for the Opticon CSP2 library
api/Opticon.OpnEnvironment.OpnDebugMode..summary: Enum OpnEnvironment.OpnDebugMode Namespace Opticon Assembly Opticon.csp2.dll Specifies the debug mode for the CSP2 library. public enum OpnEnvironment.OpnDebugMode Fields Basic = 1 Basic debug information enabled. Off = 0 Debugging disabled. Verbose = 2 All debug information enabled (verbose).

api/Opticon.OpnEnvironment.html.title: Class OpnEnvironment | Opticon.csp2 .NET wrapper for the Opticon CSP2 library
api/Opticon.OpnEnvironment.html.summary: Class OpnEnvironment Namespace Opticon Assembly Opticon.csp2.dll Provides access to global configuration, initialization, and runtime information for the underlying CSP2 library. public static class OpnEnvironment Inheritance object OpnEnvironment Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Properties DebugMode Sets the debug mode of the underlying CSP2 library. public static OpnEnvironment.OpnDebugMode DebugMode { set; } Property Value OpnEnvironment.OpnDebugMode The desired debug mode. Remarks Requires a debug build of csp2.dll. Off: Debugging disabled. Basic: Enables basic debug output. Verbose: Enables all debug output. Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the underlying CSP2 call fails. RetryCount Gets or sets the number of retry attempts used by the underlying CSP2 communication layer. public static int RetryCount { get; set; } Property Value int Remarks This setting controls how many times the library will retry a failed communication attempt before returning an error. Increasing this value may improve reliability in unstable connections but can also increase latency. Exceptions OpnException Thrown when the underlying CSP2 call fails. Methods GetDllVersion() Tries to initialize the CSP2 library and retrieves the DLL version. public static string GetDllVersion() Returns string Returns the version of the CSP2 DLL. Fail when the version cannot be retrieved and/or dll could not be loaded. Exceptions OpnException Thrown when there's an issue loading the csp2.dll.

api/Opticon.OpnTemporaryException.html.summary: Class OpnTemporaryException Namespace Opticon Assembly Opticon.csp2.dll Exception thrown when a transient error occurs that may be resolved by retrying the operation. public class OpnTemporaryException : OpnException, ISerializable Inheritance object Exception OpnException OpnTemporaryException Implements ISerializable Inherited Members OpnException.Status Exception.GetBaseException() Exception.GetObjectData(SerializationInfo, StreamingContext) Exception.GetType() Exception.ToString() Exception.Data Exception.HelpLink Exception.HResult Exception.InnerException Exception.Message Exception.Source Exception.StackTrace Exception.TargetSite Exception.SerializeObjectState object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Constructors OpnTemporaryException(string, Csp2Status) Initializes a new instance of the OpnTemporaryException class. public OpnTemporaryException(string message, Csp2Status status) Parameters message string The message that describes the temporary error. status Csp2Status The status code associated with the temporary error.

api/Opticon.RejectRedundantCodes.html.title: Enum RejectRedundantCodes | Opticon.csp2 .NET wrapper for the Opticon CSP2 library
api/Opticon.RejectRedundantCodes.html.summary: Enum RejectRedundantCodes Namespace Opticon Assembly Opticon.csp2.dll Redundant barcode filtering options. public enum RejectRedundantCodes Fields Any = 2 Reject any duplicate barcodes. Consecutive = 1 Reject consecutive identical barcodes. Off = 0 Redundant barcode filtering disabled (default)

api/Opticon.csp2.html.title: Class csp2 | Opticon.csp2 .NET wrapper for the Opticon CSP2 library
api/Opticon.csp2.html.summary: Class csp2 Namespace Opticon Assembly Opticon.csp2.dll .NET Wrapper class for interfacing with Opticon OPN Companion devices. This assembly requires Opticon's version of csp2.dll. public static class csp2 Inheritance object csp2 Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Methods ClearData() Clears all collected data stored on the OPN Companion device. public static extern int ClearData() Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks This does not affect data already retrieved into the PC's internal buffer via ReadData(). ClearData(int) Clears all collected data stored on the specified device. public static extern int ClearData(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks This does not affect data already retrieved into the PC's internal buffer via ReadData(). DataAvailable() Checks the CTS line to determine if data is available to be read. public static extern int DataAvailable() Returns int A value greater than 0 if data is available; 0 if no data is available; less than 0 on failure. Remarks For CS1504 devices, WakeUp() must be called before using this function. DataAvailable(int) Checks the CTS line for data availability on the specified COM port. public static extern int DataAvailable(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int A value greater than 0 if data is available; 0 if no data is available; less than 0 on failure. Remarks Important: For CS1504 devices, WakeUp() must be called before using this function. DisablePolling() Suspends the active polling thread. public static extern int DisablePolling() Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. EnablePolling() Resumes a suspended polling thread. public static extern int EnablePolling() Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. GetASCIIMode() Retrieves a value corresponding to the ASCII MODE parameter of the OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetASCIIMode() Returns int >=0: The current ASCII mode information. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. GetASCIIMode(int) Retrieves a value corresponding to the ASCII MODE parameter of the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetASCIIMode(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int >=0: The current ASCII mode information. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. GetCTS() Reads the status of the CTS line for the OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetCTS() Returns int 1 = SET, 0 = CLEAR, <0 = failure. GetCTS(int) Reads the status of the CTS line for the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetCTS(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int 1 = SET, 0 = CLEAR, <0 = failure. GetCodeType(int, char[], int) Converts a numeric barcode type ID to a human-readable string. public static extern int GetCodeType(int CodeID, char[] CodeType, int nMaxLength) Parameters CodeID int Integer value of the code ID. CodeType char[] The result buffer to receive the type name. nMaxLength int Maximum size of the result buffer. Returns int STATUS_OK on success, <0 on failure. GetDSR() Reads the status of the DSR line for the OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetDSR() Returns int 1 = SET, 0 = CLEAR, <0 = failure. GetDSR(int) Reads the status of the DSR line for the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetDSR(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int 1 = SET, 0 = CLEAR, <0 = failure. GetDeviceId(out string) Retrieves the unique device ID from the OPN Companion device. public static int GetDeviceId(out string DeviceId) Parameters DeviceId string When this method returns, contains the hex string of the ID. Returns int A value >= 0 on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks Requires a prior call to Interrogate(). GetDeviceId(out string, int) Retrieves the unique device ID from the specified OPN Companion device. public static int GetDeviceId(out string DeviceId, int nComPort) Parameters DeviceId string When this method returns, contains the hex string of the ID. nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int A value >= 0 on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks Requires a prior call to Interrogate(int) on the same port. GetDllVersion(StringBuilder, int) Retrieves the software version of the DLL itself. public static extern int GetDllVersion(StringBuilder szDllVersion, int nMaxLength) Parameters szDllVersion StringBuilder Buffer where the software version string is copied. nMaxLength int Maximum size of the szDllVersion buffer. Returns int STATUS_OK on success, <0 on failure. GetOpnCompatiblePorts(int[]) Retrieves an array of COM port numbers from compatible OPN Companion devices. public static extern int GetOpnCompatiblePorts(int[] portArray) Parameters portArray int[] Buffer to receive the port numbers. Returns int The number of compatible ports found. GetPacket(out BarcodeRecord, int) Retrieves barcode data stored in the internal buffer by a previous ReadData() call. public static int GetPacket(out BarcodeRecord aPacket, int nBarcodeNumber) Parameters aPacket BarcodeRecord When this method returns, contains the parsed barcode packet. nBarcodeNumber int The index of the barcode to retrieve (starting at 0). Returns int A value >= 0 on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks Important: ReadData() must be called before this function. This function only reads from the internal buffer filled by ReadData(). Note: Timestamp availability depends on the device RTC mode. If RTC mode is disabled (see GetRTCMode()), the timestamp field will not be populated. GetPacket(out BarcodeRecord, int, int) Retrieves barcode data stored in the internal buffer for the specified device. public static int GetPacket(out BarcodeRecord aPacket, int nBarcodeNumber, int nComPort) Parameters aPacket BarcodeRecord When this method returns, contains the parsed barcode packet. nBarcodeNumber int The index of the barcode to retrieve (starting at 0). nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int A value >= 0 on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks Important: ReadData() must be called before this function. This function only reads from the internal buffer filled by ReadData(). Note: Timestamp availability depends on the device RTC mode. If RTC mode is disabled (see GetRTCMode()), the timestamp field will not be populated. GetParam(int, byte[], int) Reads a device parameter from the OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetParam(int nParam, byte[] szString, int nMaxLength) Parameters nParam int The number of the parameter to read. szString byte[] The buffer to receive the parameter value. nMaxLength int The size of the receiving buffer. Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. GetParam(int, byte[], int, int) Reads a device parameter from the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetParam(int nParam, byte[] szString, int nMaxLength, int nComPort) Parameters nParam int The number of the parameter to read. szString byte[] The buffer to receive the parameter value. nMaxLength int The size of the receiving buffer. nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. GetProtocol() Retrieves the protocol version number from the OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetProtocol() Returns int >=0: The protocol version number. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. Remarks Important: Interrogate() must be called prior to this function to ensure the protocol information is retrieved from the device. GetProtocol(int) Retrieves the protocol version number from the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetProtocol(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int >=0: The protocol version number. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. Remarks Important: Interrogate(int) must be called for the same COM port prior to this function to ensure the protocol information is retrieved from the device. GetRTCMode() Retrieves a value corresponding to the RTC value parameter of the OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetRTCMode() Returns int >=0: The current RTC storage information. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. GetRTCMode(int) Retrieves a value corresponding to the RTC value parameter of the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetRTCMode(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int >=0: The current RTC storage information. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. GetRetryCount() Retrieves the number of communication retries. public static extern int GetRetryCount() Returns int The current number of retries. GetSwVersion(StringBuilder, int) Retrieves the software version string from the OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetSwVersion(StringBuilder szSwVersion, int nMaxLength) Parameters szSwVersion StringBuilder The buffer where the software version string is copied. nMaxLength int The maximum size of the szSwVersion buffer. Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. Remarks Important: Call Interrogate() before using this function. The device only provides firmware/version information after an interrogation request. GetSwVersion(StringBuilder, int, int) Retrieves the software version string from the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetSwVersion(StringBuilder szSwVersion, int nMaxLength, int nComPort) Parameters szSwVersion StringBuilder The buffer where the software version string is copied. nMaxLength int The maximum size of the szSwVersion buffer. nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. Remarks Important: Call Interrogate(int) for the same COM port before using this function. The device only provides firmware/version information after an interrogation request. GetSystemStatus() Retrieves the system status of the OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetSystemStatus() Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. Remarks Important: This function requires a prior call to Interrogate() to retrieve up-to-date status information from the device. GetSystemStatus(int) Retrieves the system status of the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int GetSystemStatus(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. Remarks Important: This function requires a prior call to Interrogate(int) on the same COM port to retrieve up-to-date status information from the device. GetTime(out DateTime) Retrieves the current time from the device. public static int GetTime(out DateTime Time) Parameters Time DateTime When this method returns, contains the DateTime retrieved from the device. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. GetTime(out DateTime, int) Retrieves the current time from the specified device. public static int GetTime(out DateTime Time, int nComPort) Parameters Time DateTime When this method returns, contains the DateTime retrieved from the device. nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. Init(int) Opens the specified serial port. public static extern int Init(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number (e.g., 1 for COM1, 2 for COM2). Returns int STATUS_OK on success; 0 on failure. Interrogate() Requests a response from the OPN Companion device. public static extern int Interrogate() Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. Remarks This function requests the device to send its current status and identification data. Important: This must be called before retrieving device information such as protocol version, device ID, system status, or firmware version. Interrogate(int) Requests a response from the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int Interrogate(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. Remarks This function requests the device to send its current status and identification data. Important: This must be called before retrieving device information such as protocol version, device ID, system status, or firmware version. PowerDown() Places the CS1504 device into power-down mode. public static extern int PowerDown() Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks This is not required for OPN Companion devices. PowerDown(int) Places the specified CS1504 device into power-down mode. public static extern int PowerDown(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks This is not required for the OPN-2001. ReadData() Reads all data from the device and stores it in an internal buffer. public static extern int ReadData() Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks Use GetPacket(out BarcodeRecord, int) or GetDeviceId(out string) to retrieve data from the buffer after calling this. ReadData(int) Reads all data from the specified device and stores it in an internal buffer. public static extern int ReadData(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. Remarks After calling this, use GetPacket(out BarcodeRecord, int, int) to access the data. ReadRawData(byte[], int) Reads raw data directly from the OPN Companion device into the provided buffer. public static extern int ReadRawData(byte[] aBuffer, int nMaxLength) Parameters aBuffer byte[] The buffer where the read data is copied. nMaxLength int Maximum size of the buffer. Returns int STATUS_OK on success, required size if nMaxLength = 0, <0 on failure. Remarks This function reads raw data without using internal packet parsing. If nMaxLength is 0, the required buffer size is returned. ReadRawData(byte[], int, int) Reads raw data from the specified OPN Companion device into the provided buffer. public static extern int ReadRawData(byte[] aBuffer, int nMaxLength, int nComPort) Parameters aBuffer byte[] The buffer where the read data is copied. nMaxLength int Maximum size of the buffer. nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success, required size if nMaxLength = 0, <0 on failure. Remarks If nMaxLength is 0, the required buffer size is returned. Restore() Closes the COM port that was opened by the default Init call. public static extern int Restore() Returns int STATUS_OK on success; 0 on failure. Restore(int) Closes the specified COM port. public static extern int Restore(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; 0 on failure. SetDTR(int) Sets the status of the DTR output line for the OPN Companion device. public static extern int SetDTR(int nOnOff) Parameters nOnOff int 1 = SET, 0 = CLEAR. Returns int STATUS_OK on success, <0 on failure. SetDTR(int, int) Sets the status of the DTR output line for the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int SetDTR(int nOnOff, int nComPort) Parameters nOnOff int 1 = SET, 0 = CLEAR. nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success, <0 on failure. SetDebugMode(int) Enables or disables DLL debug mode. public static extern int SetDebugMode(int nOnOff) Parameters nOnOff int 1 = ON, 0 = OFF. Returns int STATUS_OK on success, <0 on failure. Remarks This only works with the debug version of csp2.dll. SetDefaults() Resets the device to its factory default mode. public static extern int SetDefaults() Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. SetDefaults(int) Resets the specified device to its factory default mode. public static extern int SetDefaults(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. SetParam(int, byte[], int) Updates a single device parameter on the OPN Companion device. public static extern int SetParam(int nParam, byte[] szString, int nMaxLength) Parameters nParam int The number of the parameter to change. szString byte[] The buffer containing the new parameter setting. nMaxLength int Specifies the number of characters in szString that make up the new parameter setting. Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. SetParam(int, byte[], int, int) Updates a single device parameter on the specified OPN Companion device. public static extern int SetParam(int nParam, byte[] szString, int nMaxLength, int nComPort) Parameters nParam int The number of the parameter to change. szString byte[] The buffer containing the new parameter setting. nMaxLength int Specifies the number of characters in szString that make up the new parameter setting. nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. SetRetryCount(int) Sets the number of communication retries. public static extern int SetRetryCount(int nRetryCount) Parameters nRetryCount int Specifies the number of interrogation retry counts. A range from [ 1..9 ] is supported. Returns int STATUS_OK: Success. <0: Indicates a failure occurred. SetTime(DateTime) Sets the real-time clock on the device. public static int SetTime(DateTime Time) Parameters Time DateTime The DateTime object to sync to the device. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. SetTime(DateTime, int) Sets the real-time clock on the specified device. public static int SetTime(DateTime Time, int nComPort) Parameters Time DateTime The DateTime object to sync to the device. nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. StartPolling(csp2CallBackFunction) Starts a background thread to poll for an OPN Companion device. public static extern int StartPolling(csp2.csp2CallBackFunction csp2CallBack) Parameters csp2CallBack csp2.csp2CallBackFunction Function to call when a device is detected. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. StartPollingAll(csp2CallBackFunctionAll) Starts a background thread to poll all ports for OPN Companion devices. public static extern int StartPollingAll(csp2.csp2CallBackFunctionAll csp2CallBack) Parameters csp2CallBack csp2.csp2CallBackFunctionAll Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. StopPolling() Cancels the current polling thread. public static extern int StopPolling() Returns int STATUS_OK on success; less than 0 on failure. TimeStampToDateTime(byte[]) Converts a 4-byte timestamp array into a DateTime object. public static DateTime TimeStampToDateTime(byte[] Stamp) Parameters Stamp byte[] The byte array containing the packed timestamp. Returns DateTime A DateTime object representing the timestamp. TimeStampToStr(byte[], StringBuilder, int) Converts a packed timestamp to a readable string format. [Obsolete] public static extern int TimeStampToStr(byte[] Stamp, StringBuilder szTimeStampResult, int nMaxLength) Parameters Stamp byte[] The byte array containing the packed timestamp. szTimeStampResult StringBuilder The buffer to receive the formatted string. nMaxLength int Maximum size of the result buffer. Returns int STATUS_OK on success, <0 on failure. Remarks Note: This function is obsolete. Use GetPacket(out BarcodeRecord, int) to retrieve timestamps as DateTime objects. The result buffer must be at least 21 bytes. Format: HH:MM:SS AM MM/DD/YYYY. TimeStampToStrEx(byte[], StringBuilder, int) Converts a packed timestamp to a readable format for the specified OPN Companion device. [Obsolete] public static extern int TimeStampToStrEx(byte[] Stamp, StringBuilder szTimeStampResult, int nMaxLength) Parameters Stamp byte[] The byte array containing the packed timestamp. szTimeStampResult StringBuilder The buffer to receive the formatted string. nMaxLength int Maximum size of the result buffer. Returns int STATUS_OK on success, <0 on failure. Remarks Note: This function is obsolete. Use GetPacket(out BarcodeRecord, int, int) instead. WakeUp() Attempts to wake up the CS1504 device by setting the DTR line high. public static extern int WakeUp() Returns int STATUS_OK on success; 0 on failure. Remarks This function is required for CS1504 devices before calling functions like DataAvailable() to ensure the device is responsive. WakeUp(int) Attempts to wake up a specific CS1504 device on the given COM port. public static extern int WakeUp(int nComPort) Parameters nComPort int The serial port number. Returns int STATUS_OK on success; 0 on failure. Remarks This function is required for CS1504 devices before calling functions like DataAvailable() to ensure the device is responsive.

api/Opticon.html.title: Namespace Opticon | Opticon.csp2 .NET wrapper for the Opticon CSP2 library
api/Opticon.html.summary: Namespace Opticon Classes BarcodeRecord Represents a single barcode data record retrieved from the device. OpnCommunicationException Exception thrown when a communication failure occurs between the host and the OPN device. OpnDevice High-level wrapper around the csp2 API for Opticon OPN Companion devices. OpnEnvironment Provides access to global configuration, initialization, and runtime information for the underlying CSP2 library. OpnException Represents a general error that occurs during an OPN device operation. OpnTemporaryException Exception thrown when a transient error occurs that may be resolved by retrying the operation. Enums BarcodeSymbology Defines barcode symbologies of a BarcodeRecord as reported by the device. BatteryLowIndication Battery low indication options (bit flags). BuzzerVolume Buzzer volume levels. Csp2Status Status codes returned by the CSP2 library. DeleteEnableOptions Delete key behavior options (bit flags). GoodReadLedOnTime Good read LED on-time options (ms) Gs1DataBarOptions GS1 DataBar options (bit flags). I2of5CheckDigit Options for Interleaved 2 of 5 check digit. LaserMode Laser operating modes. MemoryIndication Memory indication options. OpnEnvironment.OpnDebugMode Specifies the debug mode for the CSP2 library. OpnParameter Defines configurable barcode scanner parameters. RejectRedundantCodes Redundant barcode filtering options. UpcPreamble Options for UPC preamble. UpcSupplements Options for UPC supplements. Delegates OpnDevice.DeviceDetectedHandler Called when a device is detected.

getting-started.html.title: Getting Started | Opticon.csp2 .NET wrapper for the Opticon CSP2 library

index.html.title: OPN Companion SDK for developing .NET application | Opticon.csp2 .NET wrapper for the Opticon CSP2 library
index.html.summary: OPN Companion SDK for developing .NET application This is the official .NET SDK from Opticon Sensors Europe BV for the OPN Companion Scanners to create C# applications to interface with OPN Companion devices using the Nuget Opticon.csp2 package The GitHub Pages of this SDK can be found here: opn_companion_sdk_dotnet Features Provides a C# interface for communicating with Opticon Companion devices using the CSP2 native functionality. Supports .NET Standard 2.0/2.1, .NET 6, .NET 8, and .NET Framework 4.6.1+. Compatible with WinForms, WPF, Console applications, and Windows Services. Simplifies device connection, polling, barcode reading, and parameter management Installation Install via NuGet: dotnet add package Opticon.csp2 Or search for 'Opticon.csp2' in the Visual Studio NuGet Package Manager. Compatibility Platform Supported .NET Framework 4.6.1+ ✅ .NET Standard 2.0 ✅ .NET 6 / .NET 8 ✅ Usage The following example demonstrates how to initialize the DLL, poll for devices, and retrieve barcode data. using Opticon; class Program { static void Main(string[] args) { try { Console.WriteLine(String.Format("Csp2 DLL Version = {0}", OpnEnvironment.GetDllVersion())); var connectedDevices = new HashSet<int>(); // Used to avoid duplicate connection messages OpnDevice.StartPolling(device => { try { if (device.IsConnected) { string deviceId = device.GetDeviceId(); string model = device.GetModel(); // Handle new connection if (connectedDevices.Add(device.Port)) { Console.WriteLine($"[{model}] [{deviceId}] [COM{device.Port}] Connected ({device.GetSoftwareVersion()})"); } // Handle barcode data if (device.IsDataAvailable) { // Read all barcodes from the device and store them in a list var barcodes = device.ReadBarcodes(); Console.WriteLine($"[{device.GetModel()}] [{deviceId}] [COM{device.Port}] {barcodes.Count} Barcode(s) Read"); foreach (var barcode in barcodes) { Console.WriteLine($"[{device.GetModel()}] [{deviceId}] [COM{device.Port}] [{barcode.Timestamp}] [{barcode.Data}] [{barcode.SymbologyName}]"); } device.ClearBarcodes(); } // Demonstrates the reading and writing of all parameter types (bool, int, enum and string/byte array) device.GetParameter(OpnParameter.Code39, out bool enabled); device.GetParameter(OpnParameter.ScannerOnTime, out int time); device.GetParameter(OpnParameter.DeleteEnable, out DeleteEnableOptions deleteOptions); device.SetParameter(OpnParameter.Code39, true); device.SetParameter(OpnParameter.ScannerOnTime, 20); device.SetParameter(OpnParameter.Gs1DataBar, Gs1DataBarOptions.Gs1DataBar | Gs1DataBarOptions.Gs1Expanded); device.SetParameter(OpnParameter.ScratchPad, "Hello"); device.GetTime(out DateTime dTime); device.SetTime(DateTime.Now); // Sync device time with PC time } else { // Handle disconnect if (connectedDevices.Remove(device.Port)) { Console.WriteLine($"[{device.GetModel()}] [{device.GetDeviceId()}] [COM{device.Port}] Disconnected"); } } } catch (Exception ex) { Console.WriteLine($"Exception occurred: {ex.Message}"); } }); } catch (Exception ex) { Console.WriteLine($"Failed to start polling: {ex.Message}"); } Console.ReadLine(); } } Troubleshooting Runtime Errors / DLL Not Found This NuGet package of the CSP2 .NET wrapper should automatically add the correct native Csp2.dll to your output directory. If any DLL errors occur, verify that the correct native Csp2.dll is present in your application's output directory. Ensure the native binary matches your target architecture (x86/x64). License This project is licensed under the MIT License.
